title: Trek Insect Repellent Wipes with Saltidin - DEET Free, Suitable for Sensitive Skin, Children 2+ Years & Pregant Women - Consists of 15x Mosquito Repellent Wipes in 1 Pack - 100% Biodegradable
features: ♻️ 100% Biodegradable Wipes – Eco-friendly materials that break down naturally after use.
🌿 DEET-Free Protection – Safe and gentle on skin, with Saltidin for effective repellent power.
⏱ Up to 12 Hours Protection – Long-lasting defence, even in humid or tropical environments.
👶 Suitable for Children 2+ – Ideal for little explorers and the whole family.
💦 Sweat & Splash Resistant – Stays effective even during active days outdoors.
🧳 Compact & Resealable Pack – Lightweight and travel-ready for backpacks, handbags, or first-aid kits.
description: Product Description Pyramid Trek Sensitive DEET Free Mosquito/Insect Repellent Wipes Enjoy the great outdoors without the nuisance of mosquitoes and insects with Pyramid Trek Sensitive DEET Free Mosquito/Insect Repellent Wipes. These convenient wipes provide effective protection against biting insects while being gentle on your skin. Why Choose Trek Sensitive? Perfect for the Whole Family From toddlers to mums-to-be, Trek wipes are safe, effective, and child friendly. Wipe, Go, Explore No fuss, no residue – just grab, wipe, and stay protected all day. Real Protection. Real Peace of Mind. Trusted by UK adventurers, recommended for global travel.
